pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Aurora Cluster Instance implements IAM roles with least-privilege policies. All sensitive configurations are parameterized to enforce organizational standards.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Multi-AZ deployment ensures resilience against availability zone failures. Automated backups with configurable retention protect against data loss.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Configurable resource sizing allows teams to match capacity to actual workload requirements.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: CloudWatch metrics provide visibility into resource utilization.

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: CloudWatch integration enables proactive monitoring and alerting. Consistent resource tagging supports cost allocation and operational visibility. Pulumi state management tracks all infrastructure changes with full audit trail.
